summary: S&P 500 up 0.5% to all-time high, Nasdaq +1.1% new ATH. April was best month since 2020 with 10% gains. Apple earnings beat driving tech rally. Oil prices fell on Middle East peace hope signals. Roblox -24% on guidance cut.
